_comment: Template for nq-publish.service. Each host customizes locally; live configs live outside the repo (gitignored). See README and AGENTS.md.
_sqlite_wal_targets_comment: Optional but recommended. Activates the stat-only SQLite WAL probe: per target per cycle it stats the db/wal/shm trio and reads /proc/locks to set pinned_reader_present (the checkpoint-pin signal a mtime-based detector misses). Declare every production SQLite writer AND nq's own db_path (self-coverage — a WAL pin on nq.db is otherwise invisible to nq). The probe never opens the DB, so a self-target cannot pin nq.db. Symlinked handles are canonicalized to find sidecars. Empty/omitted = probe inert. /proc/locks enrichment defaults on (sqlite_wal_proc_locks_enabled).
_zfs_witness_comment: Optional. Configure when this host has a ZFS witness helper installed. helper_path is the absolute path to the witness binary; wrapper is prepended to invocation (e.g. ['sudo','-n'] for sudo_helper privilege model, [] for unprivileged).
_smart_witness_comment: Optional. Configure when this host has a SMART witness helper installed. SMART invariably needs sudo (smartctl requires root); wrapper should be ['sudo','-n'] with a NOPASSWD sudoers grant for helper_path.
